result:
Implemented a notebook-wide `tasks` feature in [main.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main.go) and documented it in [README.md](/home/changkun/null-codex/README.md).

The CLI now has `tasks [--tag ...] [--include-archived|--archived-only]`, which scans Markdown checkbox list items, keeps only open tasks, and prints them grouped by note. The web app now indexes those same tasks into the snapshot, adds a `/tasks` page with the existing tag and archived filters, keeps filter links scoped to the current page, and renders checkbox list items as disabled checkboxes in note views and on the task index. I also added coverage in [main_test.go](/home/changkun/null-codex/main_test.go) for task extraction, CLI grouping/filtering, checkbox rendering, and the new `/tasks` page.

I could not run `gofmt` or `go test` here because this environment does not have `gofmt` or `go` installed on `PATH` or under `/usr/local/go/bin`.
